name: Aisha — ML Engineer Pivoter
career_goal: Pivot from data analytics into machine learning engineering. Strong Python and ML foundations but limited production ML experience.
resume_text: Data Analyst with 3 years at a mid-size retail company. Expertise in Python, SQL, pandas, and scikit-learn. Built internal dashboards and ran A/B tests. Took online ML coursework and built personal projects in PyTorch. Completed fast.ai course. No formal ML production experience but strong analytical foundation.

name: Marcus — New Graduate
career_goal: Land first full-time role after MSBA. 2 analytics internships. Looking for entry-level analyst positions in tech or healthcare.
resume_text: MSBA candidate at UC Davis graduating June 2026. 2 internships in data analytics: one at a healthcare startup (SQL, Tableau) and one at a retail company (Python, Excel). Strong academics. Skills: Python, R, SQL, Tableau, PySpark, basic NLP. Looking for first full-time position.

name: Priya — Senior Engineer, Niche Constraints
career_goal: Move from backend fintech engineering into ML/AI infrastructure. 7 years SWE experience, AWS certified, wants to build ML platforms.
resume_text: Senior Software Engineer with 7 years in fintech. Led migration of monolith to microservices on Kubernetes. Built real-time data pipelines with Kafka and Spark. AWS Certified Solutions Architect. Python and Java expert. Interest in ML: deployed TensorFlow models in production, built feature stores. Want to specialize in ML platform/MLOps engineering.

name: Kenji — International, Visa-Constrained
career_goal: MS CS student graduating in 2026 with OPT visa. Needs H-1B sponsorship. Published 2 research papers in NLP. Targeting large tech companies and research labs.
resume_text: MS Computer Science student at top US university graduating May 2026. Published 2 research papers in NLP (ACL 2025). Strong deep learning background: PyTorch, transformers, BERT, computer vision. C++ and Python expert. Interned at a university AI lab. GPA 3.9. OPT eligible, needs H-1B sponsorship within 12 months.
